description: Single-user browser-based dividend investment planning SPA for Korean investors. React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Recharts on Vercel. localStorage for holdings. Serverless proxy for KRX + Yahoo Finance data.

stories.title: Project scaffold: Vite + React + TypeScript + router shell
acceptanceCriteria: package.json exists with react@18, react-dom, react-router-dom, recharts, typescript, vite as dependencies
vite.config.ts exists and references react plugin
tsconfig.json exists with strict: true and paths configured
index.html exists and references src/main.tsx
src/main.tsx exists and renders App inside BrowserRouter
src/App.tsx exists with 4 routes: /explorer, /calendar, /holdings, /scenario — each renders a non-empty placeholder page
src/routes/ExplorerPage.tsx, CalendarPage.tsx, HoldingsPage.tsx, ScenarioPage.tsx all exist
vercel.json exists with rewrites routing /api/* to Vercel function handlers and build outputDirectory: dist
npm run build succeeds (exit 0)
npm run typecheck (tsc --noEmit) exits 0

stories.title: Stateless proxy API: DTOs, Yahoo, KRX, cache headers
acceptanceCriteria: api/_lib/dto.ts exports StockQuote, DividendEvent, and FxRate TypeScript interfaces
api/_lib/yahoo.ts exports fetchStockQuote(ticker) and fetchUsdKrw() returning StockQuote and FxRate respectively, using Yahoo Finance endpoints
api/_lib/krx.ts exports fetchKrxDividendDates(ticker) returning DividendEvent[] — calls POST data.krx.co.kr/comm/bldAttendant/getJsonData.cmd; on failure returns empty array (graceful degradation)
api/_lib/cache.ts exports setCacheHeaders(res) that sets Cache-Control: s-maxage=86400, stale-while-revalidate=43200
api/stock/[ticker].ts exists and returns StockQuote JSON with Cache-Control header on success
api/fx/usdkrw.ts exists and returns FxRate JSON with Cache-Control header
api/calendar/[market].ts exists, routes KR to krx.ts and US to yahoo.ts, returns DividendEvent[] with Cache-Control header

tests/api.normalization.test.ts exists and passes: tests StockQuote DTO shape from a Yahoo fixture, FxRate DTO shape, DividendEvent[] from a KRX success fixture, and a KRX-unavailable fixture returning empty array
grep -r 'prisma\|mongoose\|pg\|mysql\|sqlite\|knex\|typeorm\|sequelize' api/ returns no matches (no persistence imports)
npm test -- api.normalization exits 0

stories.title: Pure domain core: tax (6-cell matrix), projection, fx
acceptanceCriteria: src/domain/types.ts exports Market ('KR'|'US'), AccountType ('ISA'|'PENSION'|'GENERAL'), ProjectionModel ('optimistic'|'base'|'pessimistic'), IsaType ('GENERAL_TYPE'|'PREFERENCE_TYPE'), and Position interface
src/domain/fx.ts exports usdToKrw(amountUsd: number, rate: number): number

src/domain/tax.ts exports dividendTax(input: DividendTaxInput): number with all 6 matrix cells: ISA-KR (0% below threshold / 9.9% above), ISA-US (15% withholding), PENSION-KR (deferred, age-tiered at withdrawal), PENSION-US (15% at source + deferred KR), GENERAL-KR (15.4%), GENERAL-US (15%)

src/domain/tax.ts exports ISA_TAX_FREE_LIMIT_GENERAL = 2_000_000 and ISA_TAX_FREE_LIMIT_PREFERENCE = 4_000_000 and ISA_OVER_LIMIT_RATE = 0.099 and US_WITHHOLDING_RATE = 0.15 and GENERAL_KR_RATE = 0.154
src/domain/projection.ts exports project({ monthlyDca, years, model, annualDividendYield, ... }): { series: number[], headlineTotal: number } where series.length === years * 12 (exclusive of t=0)
grep -r 'import.*react\|import.*fetch\|import.*axios\|require.*react' src/domain/ returns no matches (pure, no React/network imports)

tests/tax.test.ts passes: ISA-KR below threshold = 0, above threshold = gross*0.099; ISA-US = gross*0.15 (US withholding); mixed KR+US dividends count toward isaProfitToDate for ISA threshold; PENSION accumulation tax = 0, withdrawal with ageAtWithdrawal=55 applies 5.5%, age=75 applies 4.4%, age=82 applies 3.3%; GENERAL-KR = gross*0.154; GENERAL-US = gross*0.15; PENSION-US = gross*0.85 accumulated then 연금소득세 at withdrawal
tests/projection.test.ts passes: optimistic >= base >= pessimistic headline invariant; series.length === years*12
tests/fx.test.ts passes: usdToKrw(1, 1300) === 1300
npm test -- tax projection fx exits 0

stories.title: Holdings management: localStorage CRUD + UI
acceptanceCriteria: src/store/holdingsStore.ts exports addHolding, updateHolding, deleteHolding, getHoldings using localStorage key 'dividend-app:holdings:v1' with a schemaVersion field

A Position stored via addHolding persists exactly {ticker, market, quantity, costBasis, accountType, schemaVersion} and getHoldings() returns it after a simulated page reload (localStorage clear+restore in test)
accountType validation: addHolding rejects any value not in ['ISA','PENSION','GENERAL'] (throws or returns error)
src/components/HoldingsTable.tsx renders a list of positions from the store

src/components/HoldingForm.tsx has inputs for ticker, market, quantity, cost basis, account type and a submit button; account type uses a select with exactly 3 options: ISA/연금저축/일반 mapping to ISA/PENSION/GENERAL
src/routes/HoldingsPage.tsx wires HoldingsTable and HoldingForm so adding a position via the form appends it to the table
tests/holdingsStore.test.ts passes: add/get/update/delete roundtrip, persistence across simulated reload, account type validation
npm test -- holdingsStore exits 0
npm run build succeeds after Holdings phase

stories.title: Explorer + Calendar UI: search, detail card, dividend calendar
acceptanceCriteria: src/api/client.ts exports fetchStock(ticker), fetchFxRate(), fetchCalendar(market) as typed async functions calling /api/* endpoints
src/lib/format.ts exports formatKrw(amount: number): string using Korean locale (₩ or 원 symbol, comma-separated) and formatPercent(rate: number): string
src/components/StockSearch.tsx renders a text input and on submit calls fetchStock; shows loading and error states

src/components/StockDetailCard.tsx renders: current price in native currency, KRW-converted price (using usdToKrw from fx.ts + fetchFxRate), annual dividend yield as %, dividend schedule (ex-div date, payment date, DPS); has 'Add to Holdings' button that calls addHolding and a 'Open Scenario' link that navigates to /scenario with ticker prefilled

src/components/DividendCalendarView.tsx reads Holdings from holdingsStore and renders upcoming ex-dividend and payment dates for held tickers only; shows empty state with prompt when Holdings is empty
src/routes/ExplorerPage.tsx wires StockSearch + StockDetailCard
src/routes/CalendarPage.tsx wires DividendCalendarView
KRW-converted price displayed = usdToKrw(nativePrice, fxRate) — unit test verifies this equality
npm run build succeeds after Explorer+Calendar phase
npm run typecheck exits 0

stories.title: Scenario Simulator: DCA projection + tax comparison + chart
acceptanceCriteria: src/components/ScenarioForm.tsx has inputs: stock/ETF ticker, monthly DCA amount (KRW), time horizon (years), account type (ISA/연금저축/일반), projection model (optimistic/base/pessimistic), ISA type (일반형/서민형, shown only when ISA selected), age at withdrawal (number, default 55, shown only when 연금저축 selected)
src/components/ProjectionChart.tsx renders a Recharts line/area chart with series.length === years*12 data points showing projected monthly dividend income

src/components/AccountComparisonTable.tsx renders 3 rows (ISA/연금저축/일반) with after-tax headline totals; 연금저축 row includes a note that the value undervalues 연금저축 by ignoring 세액공제 contribution credit; all 3 values differ for non-degenerate inputs
연금저축 after-tax headline in AccountComparisonTable is strictly less than the pre-tax accumulated value (withdrawal tax applied, not 0)
ISA headline for US stock input shows gross*(1-0.15) for amounts below the 비과세 threshold (15% US withholding applied even inside ISA)
'Open Scenario' link from StockDetailCard navigates to /scenario and prefills the ticker input
src/routes/ScenarioPage.tsx wires ScenarioForm + ProjectionChart + AccountComparisonTable
npm run build succeeds after Scenario phase
npm run typecheck exits 0
npm test exits 0 (all suites)

stories.title: Polish, error handling, README, scope guard verification
acceptanceCriteria: All 4 pages show a loading spinner or skeleton while API calls are in-flight
All 4 pages show a user-readable error message when an API call fails (not a blank page or unhandled error)
CalendarPage shows 'KR dividend dates unavailable' empty state when /api/calendar/KR returns an empty array (graceful degradation for KRX failure)
README.md exists at repo root with: local dev instructions (npm install + vercel dev), env var documentation, and Vercel deploy instructions
Route inventory check: grep -r 'auth\|login\|signup\|register\|news\|briefing\|screening\|capital.gain\|market.wide' src/routes/ returns no matches (scope guard AC-G1)
grep -r 'prisma\|mongoose\|pg\|mysql\|sqlite\|knex\|typeorm' api/ returns no matches (AC-B2 final check)
npm run build exits 0
npm test exits 0 — all suites: tax, projection, fx, holdingsStore, api.normalization
npm run typecheck exits 0
